segment.source: Renders exactly three pricing plan cards in a row, each with name, price, billing period, description, up to eight check-marked features, and a CTA button; one plan can be marked recommended with ring and badge. Use it for: good-better-best plan sections (Starter/Pro/Enterprise), three membership levels, three service packages with prices. Prefer 'Four Tier Pricing' for four plans, 'Two Tier Pricing' for two, and 'Plan Comparison Matrix' for row-by-row feature tables.
